content.en:
Jiuyang Sea.

Ye Tian soon came here, and saw a lot of great ancestors here, all of whom came to see the excitement.

And the great ancestors of Xuanqi Pavilion have already entered the Jiuyang Sea, and the great ancestors of the Jiuyang Sea have also come out.

For Jiuyang Hai, the Xuanqi Pavilion is not a matter of concern, they will not hide inside the Great Array of Jiuyang Hai Headquarters, it will be too embarrassing.

Above the endless void of the Jiuyang Sea, the two sides confronted each other.

At this time, Ye Tian noticed the existence of the Xuanqi armor.

Xuanqi Jiashi is not a cultivator, he can only be regarded as a dead thing, and his energy is all maintained by the origin gold crystal, so the energy is restrained, and ordinary ancestors can't see through it.

But Ye Tian swept it with his copying talent, and he saw a clue.

"Something similar to a puppet, but it's of a very high grade and can't be understood!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Rumble!

The Jiuyang Great Ancestor of Jiuyang Sea tore through time and space and descended, and the terrifying aura permeated the entire Jiuyang Sea, making countless Great Ancestors who were watching the excitement around them tremble.

This is the terrifying strength of the fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms!

With the strength of the Nine Yang Great Ancestor, kill a fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform, and you can kill it in seconds with a wave of your hand.

At this moment, Jiuyang Great Ancestor looked at Xuanwu Great Ancestor and them, and sneered: "Xuanwu Great Ancestor, originally you stayed in Xuanqi Mountain, and I really didn't dare to make a move on you. However, you actually came out of Xuanqi Mountain, aren't you afraid that I will kill you all?"

"Jiuyang Great Ancestor, do you think we dare to come to your Jiuyang Sea without hole cards?"

The Xuanqi Great Ancestor was full of confidence, after all, the Xuanqi Armor was something refined by the Xuanqi Heavenly Ancestor, and he had full confidence in the Xuanqi Armor.

He believed that the strength of the Jiuyang Great Ancestor was definitely inferior to the Xuanqi Jiashi.

If it goes well, the Xuanqi Armor may be able to severely damage the Jiuyang Great Ancestor, or even kill the Jiuyang Great Ancestor.

"Oh, is this your hole card?"

Jiuyang Great Ancestor's gaze looked at Xuanqi Jiashi, and he naturally saw it.

However, he didn't know the Xuanqi armor, after all, the Xuanqi Pavilion had never used this hole card.

"Not bad!"

Xuanwu Great Ancestor admitted.

Rumble!

Xuanqi Armor stepped out, and the terrifying aura gradually appeared.

Seeing this, the great ancestors around were shocked.

"Stage 5!"

This Xuanqi armor is obviously a puppet, but it exudes an aura comparable to that of a fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform, which is simply incredible!

"Origin Golden Crystal !!"

Jiuyang Great Ancestor's face changed, and he actually sensed the breath of the Origin Golden Crystal.

The puppet with the Origin Golden Crystal as an energy source has only one thing - the Infinite Realm Armor!

"This is the Infinite Realm Armorer?"

Thinking of this, Jiuyang Great Ancestor subconsciously took a step back, but quickly reacted.

"No, it's impossible for you Xuanqi Pavilion to have an Infinite Realm Armor!"

The Great Ancestor of Jiuyang knew very well the value of the Infinite Realm Armor Warriors, and if dozens of Infinite Realm Armor Warriors were combined into a battle array, they could besiege and kill a Heavenly Ancestor.

Even if it is a single Infinite Realm Armor, it is also a near-invincible combat power of the fifth stage, and it can instantly kill the top fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms.

The value of the Infinite Realm Armor Warrior is enough to bankrupt an ordinary Heavenly Ancestor, and the Xuanqi Heavenly Ancestor is just an ordinary Heavenly Ancestor, how could he leave an Infinite Realm Armor Warrior for the Xuanqi Pavilion as a hole card?

Moreover, the aura of this Xuanqi armor is far inferior to that of the Infinite Realm armor.

Xuanwu Great Ancestor smiled and said, "Jiuyang Great Ancestor, the Qi Armor of Xuanqi Pavilion is indeed not a real Infinite Realm Armor, just a pseudo Infinite Realm Armor, but it also has a strength comparable to the top fifth-stage high-level Infinite Life Form. "

"Up!"

Xuanwu Great Ancestor shouted.

The Xuanqi Armor Warrior rushed forward in an instant, and instantly formed a domain that belonged to the Xuanqi Armor Warrior, trapping the Jiuyang Great Ancestor, lest the Jiuyang Ancestor avoid the Xuanqi Armor Warrior and attack the other Great Ancestors of the Xuanqi Pavilion.

Subsequently, the Xuanwu Great Ancestor led the other Great Ancestors to fight against the fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms of the Jiuyang Sea.

Suddenly, the entire Jiuyang Sea turned into a battlefield.

......

"Infinite Realm Armor, Xuanqi Armor, Origin Golden Crystal!"

Although Ye Tian had heard of it before, it was the first time he had seen it.

According to his understanding, the Origin Golden Crystal is a substance that has a chance to be born after the destruction of a territory, and only when the Heavenly Ancestor makes a move, can this substance be grasped and condensed into the Source Golden Crystal.

However, it is very difficult to break a territory, even if the Heavenly Ancestor makes a move, there is no way to break a territory, only some special reasons will make a territory fall into ruin.

As for what the particular reason is, he is not clear.

In short, the value of the Origin Gold Crystal is extremely rare and precious.

Previously, there was the treasure of the Origin Golden Crystal in the treasure list of Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor, but the contribution value required was massive, so it was impossible to exchange it at all.

And the Infinite Realm Armor is even more precious, there are no ordinary Heavenly Ancestors, and Ye Tian has only heard of the name before.

Although the Xuanqi Armor of Xuanqi Pavilion is not as good as the Infinite Realm Armor, it is absolutely extremely precious, and only the Heavenly Ancestor can refine it.

Xuanqi Pavilion has such hole cards, and Jiuyang Hai may not be able to win in this battle, and there is even a high probability of losing.

"It's strange, Xuanqi Pavilion has such a hole card, why don't you show it? If it comes out early, Jiuyang Sea will definitely not dare to invade Xuanwu Mountain, and Xuanxin Great Ancestor will not fall!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Thinking about it, there is only one possibility, that is, this hole card is a real hole card, which cannot be shown casually, that is, it cannot be used again and again.

It is impossible for the Xuanqi armor to be broken after using it once, and the only reason is that the number of origin gold crystals is not large, and he is reluctant to urge the Xuanqi armor to be a hole card.

But in the case of not knowing how many origin gold crystals Xuanqi Pavilion has, no one dares to test rashly.

Time passed slowly, and the battle between Xuanqi Pavilion and Jiuyang Sea gradually became white-hot, and many Great Ancestors had already fallen, and even the fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms were not lightly injured.

But they all knew very well that the real decision would depend on the battle between the Jiuyang Great Ancestor and the Xuanqi Jiashi.

At this moment, the domain of the Xuanqi armor was broken, and a figure rushed out, and it was the Jiuyang Great Ancestor.

However.

At this moment, Jiuyang Great Ancestor was very embarrassed, one arm was missing, and it had not recovered, which showed that the injury was very serious.

Moreover, the armor on the Jiuyang Great Ancestor was cracked, and the defense of that set of armor was definitely much more high-end than Ye Tian's Golden God Armor Stone Defense Armor, but it was still about to be scrapped.

"Withdraw to HQ!"

Jiuyang Great Ancestor ordered.

This order also means that Jiuyang Sea has fallen into the downwind, which can be regarded as a defeat!
